llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.1 pulled - will not be discussed tonight, deferred to future meeting. Item 9.3 moved from consent to action for discussion and elaboration on video intercom buzzer proposal for Haas School.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve. All those in favor? Aye.
